description: Portfolio Coverage & Conceptual Inventory Ledger — a portfolio-level coverage layer above the Category Artifact Meaning Layer (data/asset-meanings.json) and the Category Cluster & Buyer Logic Layer (data/category-clusters.json). It answers how many domains are in the Sohadot portfolio, how many carry a protected canonical meaning, which fields each defined asset is suitable for, and which domains remain pending Canonical Meaning Lock. It does not invent meanings for undefined domains and does not expand the 50 Category Artifacts. Rendered in /conceptual-inventory.html and checked by scripts/validate_conceptual_inventory.py.

records.canonical_meaning: Names account-currency control: the finance-infrastructure layer that governs which Currency an account is denominated in, how multi-currency accounts are structured, and how currency exposure is tracked at the account level.
possible_fields: Treasury and FX exposure management platforms
records.buyer_logic: B2B integration vendors, telecom infrastructure firms, payment infrastructure companies, enterprise data exchange platforms, and operational analytics vendors — buyers whose product is the plumbing other companies build on top of.

records.canonical_meaning: Names AGI as an origin event — 'beget' (to father, to bring into being) frames artificial general intelligence not as a product feature but as a generative origin point from which further systems, capabilities, or entities descend.
records.buyer_logic: AI agent platforms, digital delegation systems, legal/commercial representation tools, liaison infrastructure, and frontier AI interface ventures — buyers building the authorization layer between a principal and the party acting for them.

records.canonical_meaning: Aliaise reads as 'a liaise' — naming active liaison: the ongoing act of coordinating, bridging context, and interfacing between separate parties or systems.
possible_fields: Cross-team and cross-organization liaison and coordination platforms
Diplomatic, vendor, or partner-relationship coordination tools
records.buyer_logic: AI agent platforms, digital delegation systems, legal/commercial representation tools, liaison infrastructure, and frontier AI interface ventures — buyers building the authorization layer between a principal and the party acting for them.

records.canonical_meaning: Allenarly is a genuine, rare adverb — most familiar from Scots legal usage (e.g. 'in liferent allenarly') — meaning exclusively, solely, only. It names singular, exclusive restriction rather than any compound wordplay.
possible_fields: Legal-tech and rights or licensing-restriction platforms
Legal drafting and contract-clause reference tools
records.buyer_logic: Scientific publishers, clinical reference platforms, biotech education companies, chemistry platforms, geophysics firms, pronunciation and linguistics tools, forensic and evidentiary standards bodies, and terminology databases — buyers whose credibility depends on naming being real, not invented.

records.canonical_meaning: Alwakile transliterates the Arabic الوكيل (al-wakīl) — the agent, representative, or trusted delegate empowered to act on another's behalf — a real Arabic legal/commercial term for delegated agency.
records.buyer_logic: AI agent platforms, digital delegation systems, legal/commercial representation tools, liaison infrastructure, and frontier AI interface ventures — buyers building the authorization layer between a principal and the party acting for them.

records.canonical_meaning: Antithermic is a real word meaning heat-resisting or anti-thermal — describing materials, treatments, or systems designed to resist or counteract heat transfer.
possible_fields: Advanced industrial cooling and thermal-control technology
records.buyer_logic: Scientific publishers, clinical reference platforms, biotech education companies, chemistry platforms, geophysics firms, pronunciation and linguistics tools, forensic and evidentiary standards bodies, and terminology databases — buyers whose credibility depends on naming being real, not invented.

records.canonical_meaning: Names augmented-reality top-view sight: an AR system that renders a strategic overhead (top-down) view — situational awareness from above, rendered through augmented reality rather than a physical overhead camera alone.
possible_fields: Logistics and warehouse overhead-view AR tools
Defense and security overhead-intelligence AR platforms
records.buyer_logic: XR platforms, AR visualization companies, personal mobility startups, simulation/onboarding products, and aerial mobility brands — buyers building the next physical or virtual interface layer for human movement and perception.

records.canonical_meaning: Reads as 'a savor' — naming savor/taste as an act of judgment: the discerning evaluation that separates what is worth choosing from what is not, whether applied to flavor, sensory data, or algorithmic selection.
possible_fields: Food and flavor discernment / sommelier-style platforms
AI-driven curation and semantic quality-selection systems
Recommendation engines built on discernment rather than popularity
records.buyer_logic: Commerce platforms, merchant enablement companies, CRO vendors, revenue diagnostic tools, SXO platforms, and growth infrastructure companies — buyers who compete on control of the commercial path, not just traffic volume.

records.canonical_meaning: Names Artificial Super Intelligence as a genesis event one order beyond AGIBeget — the origin point of superintelligent systems, held as a long-horizon deep-tech seed rather than a near-term product.
possible_fields: Deep-tech venture studios positioning for post-AGI horizons
records.buyer_logic: AI agent platforms, digital delegation systems, legal/commercial representation tools, liaison infrastructure, and frontier AI interface ventures — buyers building the authorization layer between a principal and the party acting for them.

records.canonical_meaning: Names the liaison layer between institutions or humans and Artificial Super Intelligence — the coordination and translation function that sits between human governance and a superintelligent system.
records.buyer_logic: AI agent platforms, digital delegation systems, legal/commercial representation tools, liaison infrastructure, and frontier AI interface ventures — buyers building the authorization layer between a principal and the party acting for them.

records.canonical_meaning: Rooted in authentic chemistry — bisulfide compounds are central to biochemistry (disulfide bonds in proteins) and industrial chemistry (desulfurization, water treatment, mining). The domain reads as a genuine scientific term, not an invented brandable.
records.buyer_logic: Scientific publishers, clinical reference platforms, biotech education companies, chemistry platforms, geophysics firms, pronunciation and linguistics tools, forensic and evidentiary standards bodies, and terminology databases — buyers whose credibility depends on naming being real, not invented.

records.canonical_meaning: Names software-defined, data-native telecommunications — 'Byte' marking the data/software layer and 'Telco' marking the telecommunications carrier layer, fused into telecom infrastructure that is data-native rather than legacy circuit-switched.
records.buyer_logic: B2B integration vendors, telecom infrastructure firms, payment infrastructure companies, enterprise data exchange platforms, and operational analytics vendors — buyers whose product is the plumbing other companies build on top of.

records.canonical_meaning: Centralities is the real, plural technical term from network/graph theory — the family of measures (degree, betweenness, eigenvector, closeness centrality) that quantify a node's structural importance within a network.
records.buyer_logic: B2B integration vendors, telecom infrastructure firms, payment infrastructure companies, enterprise data exchange platforms, and operational analytics vendors — buyers whose product is the plumbing other companies build on top of.

records.canonical_meaning: A blended compound of 'Code' and 'Key' naming AI Code Access Governance: as AI systems and autonomous agents increasingly read, generate, and execute code directly, Codokey names the key-and-governance layer that decides which AI agents or models may touch which code, and under what authority.
possible_fields: API key management for AI/LLM tooling
Code signing and security infrastructure for AI-generated code
records.buyer_logic: AI infrastructure firms, chip strategy companies, quantum-readiness vendors, enterprise RAG platforms, and AI code-governance companies — buyers who compete on the layer beneath the model, not the model itself.

records.canonical_meaning: Dactylograph is a real word tied to finger-writing and fingerprint inscription — the recorded, inscribed trace a finger leaves, historically used in dactylography (fingerprint science) as an evidentiary identity mark.
possible_fields: Biometric fingerprint capture and forensic platforms
records.buyer_logic: Scientific publishers, clinical reference platforms, biotech education companies, chemistry platforms, geophysics firms, pronunciation and linguistics tools, forensic and evidentiary standards bodies, and terminology databases — buyers whose credibility depends on naming being real, not invented.

records.canonical_meaning: DNCTA resolves to a fixed technical expansion — Distal Nascent Chain Transcription Advanced — naming an advanced process concerned with the distal (downstream) end of a nascent (newly forming) chain during transcription. This is a defined molecular/technical reading with one letter per word, not an open initialism left for a buyer to fill in.
possible_fields: Genomics and molecular biology research platforms
records.buyer_logic: Scientific publishers, clinical reference platforms, biotech education companies, chemistry platforms, geophysics firms, pronunciation and linguistics tools, forensic and evidentiary standards bodies, and terminology databases — buyers whose credibility depends on naming being real, not invented.

records.canonical_meaning: Names light, drifting aerial movement — a personal urban aerial vehicle category defined by airy, gliding motion through the air rather than powered ground-vehicle drift.

Urban air-traffic concepts for low-mass individual transport
records.buyer_logic: XR platforms, AR visualization companies, personal mobility startups, simulation/onboarding products, and aerial mobility brands — buyers building the next physical or virtual interface layer for human movement and perception.

records.canonical_meaning: 'Ember' names the early spark before a fire is established — fused with 'Quantum', it names Quantum Readiness Intelligence: the ignition layer of preparation, migration planning, and intelligence gathering organizations need before quantum computing becomes ordinary infrastructure.
possible_fields: Deep-tech venture studios preparing quantum-adjacent bets
records.buyer_logic: AI infrastructure firms, chip strategy companies, quantum-readiness vendors, enterprise RAG platforms, and AI code-governance companies — buyers who compete on the layer beneath the model, not the model itself.

records.canonical_meaning: Names Ethereum paired with 'Lea' — an old-English word for meadow, a green, open, sustainable space — together naming a green and sustainable energy layer built on or for the Ethereum ecosystem.
records.buyer_logic: Space energy firms, sustainability infrastructure platforms, circular economy companies, energy-transition intelligence platforms, and climate-tech venture studios — buyers positioning for infrastructure that does not yet exist at scale.

records.canonical_meaning: Isotely is grounded in isoteleia, a real historical-civic term from Athenian Greek law: a privileged status granted to certain metics (resident foreigners) giving them equality of tax and civic obligation with citizens, without full citizenship rights. Isotely names that specific in-between status — equal duty without equal belonging.
possible_fields: Civic-tech and residency or status platforms
Membership-tier and conditional-access systems (equal duty, partial rights)
Historical and classics education and reference platforms
records.buyer_logic: Scientific publishers, clinical reference platforms, biotech education companies, chemistry platforms, geophysics firms, pronunciation and linguistics tools, forensic and evidentiary standards bodies, and terminology databases — buyers whose credibility depends on naming being real, not invented.

records.canonical_meaning: Mesomere names mesomeric resonance in organic chemistry: the phenomenon where a single Lewis structure cannot adequately represent a molecule's electron distribution, and the true structure is understood as a hybrid of multiple limiting (contributing) structures — mesomers — considered together.
possible_fields: Organic chemistry education and e-learning platforms
Scientific publishing and chemistry reference platforms
records.buyer_logic: Scientific publishers, clinical reference platforms, biotech education companies, chemistry platforms, geophysics firms, pronunciation and linguistics tools, forensic and evidentiary standards bodies, and terminology databases — buyers whose credibility depends on naming being real, not invented.

records.canonical_meaning: Names Merchant Sovereignty: a merchant who operates outward, on their own terms, rather than being owned or intermediated by the platforms that serve them. The 'Out-' prefix here is not a narrow competitive 'outperform' — it marks the merchant standing outside any single layer's control.

Merchant data and customer-relationship sovereignty platforms
records.buyer_logic: Commerce platforms, merchant enablement companies, CRO vendors, revenue diagnostic tools, SXO platforms, and growth infrastructure companies — buyers who compete on control of the commercial path, not just traffic volume.

records.canonical_meaning: ToAVR segments as To + A + VR — read aloud as 'to a VR' — naming the transition or movement into a virtual reality environment. The compressed spelling folds the article 'a' into the acronym VR, turning a bare technical term into a directional phrase.

records.canonical_meaning: YetFut is grounded in Tamazight (Amazigh/Berber), where it carries the sense of sweet or tasty — a real cultural-linguistic term of taste and pleasure, not an English compound.

records.buyer_logic: Cultural brands, food/taste ventures, Arabic/Amazigh identity platforms, semantic selection products, and culturally grounded AI brands — buyers for whom linguistic and cultural authenticity is the differentiator, not a footnote.

records.canonical_meaning: Names the logic of the missing plug: a governed diagnostic classification system for where a commercial path leaks — the specific gap ('plug') that, once identified and filled, stops value from draining out of a funnel.

records.canonical_meaning: "Open" signals accessibility and interoperability; "Revolve" signals continuous open renewal and succession — one cycle or steward succeeding the next — rather than a single closed rotation or linear depletion. Together they name a system of open succession: access stays open while stewardship, resources, or cycles hand off and renew continuously.
possible_fields: Open succession and leadership hand-off systems
Revolving credit and fintech access products
records.buyer_logic: Space energy firms, sustainability infrastructure platforms, circular economy companies, energy-transition intelligence platforms, and climate-tech venture studios — buyers positioning for infrastructure that does not yet exist at scale.

records.canonical_meaning: AIDAtanaly resolves to AIDA + T + Analy — AIDA Transition Analytics. The classic funnel is read correctly here: each letter of AIDA names a stage, and the name argues that measurable value lives in the transition between those stages, not in the stages themselves as static states.
records.buyer_logic: Commerce platforms, merchant enablement companies, CRO vendors, revenue diagnostic tools, SXO platforms, and growth infrastructure companies — buyers who compete on control of the commercial path, not just traffic volume.

records.canonical_meaning: Names AI-specific electronic chips — the semiconductor layer purpose-built for artificial intelligence workloads — read together as Compute Sovereignty Intelligence: the strategic capacity to reason about and control who owns, fabricates, and allocates the chips that AI depends on.
records.buyer_logic: AI infrastructure firms, chip strategy companies, quantum-readiness vendors, enterprise RAG platforms, and AI code-governance companies — buyers who compete on the layer beneath the model, not the model itself.
